current_best_practical.note: v13 seed=42000 (v6 exact seed), sync panel. Gap vs v6 explained by async panel giving ~2.5 extra gradient iters.

investigation_conclusion.finding: v6 seed=42000. Seed variance ~10pp at iter20. Training always peaks at iter20 (PFSP echo chamber). Current code practical ceiling ~0.427. v6=0.459 due to async panel giving extra iters.
failed_interventions: val-calib-coef=0.1 (v11): biases value head to mean return
investigation_conclusion.do_not_run: More vN PPO experiments without fundamentally new intervention

key_lessons.panel_unreliability: 30-game panel has SE=0.091. Even 0.291-bench model can show panel=0.533 by luck. Never use panel as sole running_best selector. Always bench 500g/side.
key_lessons.pfsp_echo_chamber: PFSP always gravitates to self-play (near-50% WR). External fixtures get starved even with heuristic-floor=0.15. Model peaks at iter20 then declines.
key_lessons.opus_template_danger: Opus-generated commands may add flags not in original recipe. Always diff against known-good command. Key culprits: val-calib-coef, pfsp-exponent, league-mix-k.
key_lessons.seed_matters: PPO has ~10pp seed variance at iter20. v6 seed=42000 is known good. For replication experiments, always use seed=42000.
key_lessons.selfplay_vs_mcts_collector: collect_selfplay_rows_jsonl = direct policy (fast, no search). collect_mcts_games_jsonl = MCTS + Dirichlet noise (slower, better exploration). Both output same JSONL schema. For PPO rollouts, use selfplay. For exploration data, use MCTS.
